reviews.comment:
Mala atención, me extraña del ACA, el shop un desastre, llegamos un domingo y para comer algo no pudimos, estaban preocupados por cerrar

(Translated by Google)
Bad service, I'm surprised by the ACA, the shop is a disaster, we arrived on a Sunday and couldn't get anything to eat, they were worried about closing

reviews.comment:
Todo ok, pero el playero con pocas ganas de trabajar. Comprendo que es temporada alta, pero hay que ponerle un poquito de onda.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine, but the beach attendant doesn't seem very keen to work. I understand it's peak season, but they need to put in a little more effort.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNHNQQzVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy largas colas en temporada de vacaciones. Atienden muy lentamente los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
Very long queues during holiday season. The beach attendants are very slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteTVfV21nRRAB
